title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FabAlley! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
